paragraphs.text: **Connecting our community to the care it needs.** We work hand-in-hand with local health organizations and providers to solve access challenges and bring meaningful healthcare closer to home for every Anderson Island resident.
**We have great news!** We are excited to announce the first phase of our multiyear plan to bring primary care to Anderson Island via a mobile medical van.

rightColumn.heading: On-island presence
rightColumn.body:
We are dedicated to improving quality of life by facilitating exceptional healthcare, advancing optimal health outcomes, and fostering community engagement.

AIHA is governed by a [board of directors](#board) made up of island residents who have deep experience with clinical practice, community outreach, and healthcare administration.
